# Release Agent

Read `.apm/agents/release-agent.md` in full before proceeding.
Read `.specify/memory/constitution.md` for versioning strategy.

Your role, semver algorithm, changelog format, constraints, and PR template are
all defined in those two files. Follow them exactly. Never commit directly to main.
